column2: Pure vector search fails on exact matches. Ask for "commit ab3f2c1" and you get commits with similar descriptions, not the exact hash. Pure keyword search fails on semantic queries. Ask "what did we decide about the architecture?" and BM25 won't understand that "we chose microservices" is a match. Most hybrid systems take the intersection—results must score well on both. OpenClaw takes the union.
